cache_note: A local GBP snapshot database exists at the configured path. This database can store historical snapshots of GBP metrics even when the live API returns empty arrays.
screenshot_note: A manual screenshot of GBP metrics from the Google Business Profile web interface exists. This provides evidence of GBP performance even when the API returns empty arrays.
alternative_data_sources: GA4 data for website clicks and traffic (GA4_MEASUREMENT_ID configured)
Google Search Console for search impressions and clicks
Brand Intelligence Engine for review counts and ratings
Dashboard connector for real-time business metrics
note: GBP metrics are empty from the live API.
